methods.name: did_change_plots_render_settings
methods.summary: Notification that the settings to render a plot (i.e. the plot size) have changed.
methods.description: Typically fired when the plot component has been resized by the user. This notification is useful to produce accurate pre-renderings of plots.

methods.name: frontend_ready
methods.summary: Notification that the frontend is ready
methods.description: This notification is sent by the frontend after the UI comm has been established. The backend uses this signal to run session initialization hooks that may need to communicate with the frontend via RPCs (e.g. rstudioapi calls).

params.name: start_type
params.description: The type of session start: 'new' for new sessions, 'restart' for restarted sessions, 'reconnect' for reconnected sessions

methods.name: call_method
methods.summary: Run a method in the interpreter and return the result to the frontend
methods.description: Unlike other RPC methods, `call_method` calls into methods implemented in the interpreter and returns the result back to the frontend using an implementation-defined serialization scheme.

params.name: method
params.description: The method to call inside the interpreter

methods.name: evaluate_code
methods.summary: Evaluate a statement in the interpreter
methods.description: Execute a code fragment silently and return a JSON-serialized result.

schema.name: eval_result
schema.description: The results of evaluating the statement

output.description: The output, if any, emitted during evaluation
